channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][发表] Anime News Network Good Smile Company 宣布 Jyuо̄ Mujin Dandivine Mecha 动画
item.description: Anime in "The God of Combined Series" project premieres in October ― Good Smile Company announced on Wednesday a new anime titled Jyuо̄ Mujin Dandivine (Beast King War God Dandivine). The anime is... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Good Smile Company Announces Jyuо̄ Mujin Dandivine Mecha Anime

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network FROGMAN的 动画 Studio DLE Starts AI Brand Focused on Studio的 Older IP
